subcodes.first_line: At the first light of dawn We arose and directed Our steps toward the land which is renowned in the name of Truth, and when We entered therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول فجر برخواستیم و بارضیکه باسم حق مذکور است توجه نمودیم و چون داخل شدیم
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
